name: Hieratic Seal From the Ashes
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>復</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>活</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刻</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>印</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>いん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Once per opponent's turn: You can send 1 "Hieratic" monster from your Deck to your GY. Once per turn, during your turn: You can target 1 of your banished "Hieratic" monsters; return that target to the GY. If this face-up card on the field is sent to the GY: Target 1 "Hieratic" monster in your GY; Special Summon that target.
eff: Once per opponent's turn: You can send 1 "Hieratic" monster from your Deck to your GY. Once per turn, during your turn: You can target 1 of your banished "Hieratic" monsters; return that target to the GY. If this face-up card on the field is sent to the GY: Target 1 "Hieratic" monster in your GY; Special Summon that target.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Returns the player's banished cards to the Graveyard
